title: Gina connectors.json
description: Database and service connector declarations for a Gina bundle. Each key is a logical connector name; the value describes the connection parameters. Acquired at runtime via getConnection(). The required fields depend on the connector type.

connector.description: Connector driver type. Required when the key name does not match a built-in connector name (e.g. key "session" with connector "redis").

protocol.description: Connection protocol URI scheme. Required for Couchbase and AI connectors.

host.description: Hostname or IP address. Supports comma-separated values for clusters and ${variable} interpolation. Required for Couchbase, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis.

port.description: Server port. Defaults: MySQL 3306, PostgreSQL 5432, Redis 6379.

database.description: Database, bucket, or keyspace name. Also used as the model directory name under models/. Required for Couchbase, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite.

password.description: Authentication password. Supports ${variable} interpolation for secrets.

scope.description: Data isolation scope stamped on every document at insert time and used to filter queries. Falls back to NODE_SCOPE env var when omitted.

connectionLimit.description: Maximum connections in the pool. MySQL and PostgreSQL only. Defaults to 10.

ssl.description: TLS/SSL configuration. Passed through to the underlying driver (mysql2, pg). Set to true for default TLS.

file.description: SQLite only. Database file path. Defaults to ~/.gina/{version}/{database}.sqlite. Use ":memory:" for in-memory databases.

idleTimeout.description: PostgreSQL only. Idle client timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.

connectionTimeout.description: PostgreSQL only. Connection timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 2000.

db.description: Redis only. Database index (0-15). Defaults to 0.

tls.description: Redis only. Enable TLS for the connection.

prefix.description: Redis only. Key prefix for session store entries. Defaults to "sess:".

ttl.description: Redis only. Default TTL in seconds for session entries. Defaults to 86400.

cluster.description: Redis Cluster only. Array of cluster node endpoints.

keepAlive.description: Couchbase only. Enable TCP keep-alive. Defaults to true.

pingInterval.description: Couchbase only. Interval to keep the connection alive (e.g. "2m", "30s").

useScopeAndCollections.description: Couchbase only. Enable scope and collection support (SDK v3+). Defaults to true.

timeouts.description: Couchbase only. Timeout overrides passed to the SDK.

detailed_errcodes.description: Couchbase only. Expose detailed error codes instead of generic messages.

apiKey.description: AI connector only. API key for the provider. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

model.description: AI connector only. Default model identifier.

baseURL.description: AI connector only. Override the default API base URL (OpenAI-compatible providers).
